hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\""); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "nginx -s reload|systemctl reload nginx|service nginx reload"; then if ! nginx -t >/tmp/nginx-hook-test 2>&1; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"nginx -t FAILED — config invalid, reload blocked to protect the live site. Run nginx -t to see the error, fix the config, then retry the reload.\"}}"; fi; fi

cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\""); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "git push.*--force[^-]|git push.*-f[^o]|git reset --hard.*origin|rm -rf /var/www"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"BLOCKED — destructive command detected (force push / hard reset / rm -rf on VPS). This requires explicit owner approval.\"}}"; fi

cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\""); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "pm2 restart emartweb"; then vps_dirty=$(git -C /var/www/emart-platform diff HEAD --stat 2>/dev/null | wc -l); if [ "$vps_dirty" -gt 0 ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"VPS runtime tree has $vps_dirty uncommitted changes — clean it before restarting pm2. Run: git -C /var/www/emart-platform diff --stat\"}}"; fi; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Checking VPS tree cleanliness before pm2 restart...

hooks.command: file=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // \"\""); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.env|\.secret|credentials|password'; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"message\":\"Warning: Edited a sensitive file: $file — do NOT commit this without reviewing.\"}}"; fi

file=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // \"\""); if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'apps/web/src/(app|components|lib)/.*\.(tsx?|css)$'; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"message\":\"Tip: Frontend file changed. Consider /smoke-test or /deploy when ready.\"}}"; fi

file=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // \"\""); if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'sitemap|robots|canonical|generateMetadata|middleware\.ts|next\.config'; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"message\":\"Tip: SEO-sensitive file changed. Consider /audit-seo before deploying.\"}}"; fi

cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\""); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "pm2 restart emartweb"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"message\":\"Tip: PM2 restarted. Consider /smoke-test to verify the live site.\"}}"; fi

cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\""); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "git push origin main"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"message\":\"Tip: Pushed to origin. Consider /session-end to log what was done.\"}}"; fi

cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\""); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "rsync.*/var/www/emart-platform"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"message\":\"Tip: Synced to VPS. Consider /smoke-test to verify, then /deploy to commit and push.\"}}"; fi
